title: Combat Visuals!
description: A mod that adds basic Impact Frames!
body:
![Combat Visuals! Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0ddc369a6302b7f36ebe6acb20a664912705688_0.webp)

**"Combat Visuals!" is a fully configurable mod that adds some new visual effects to specific events, which so far are only "Mace Hits" and "Totem Pops".**

**The effects that the mod currently adds are;**

>
> **Custom Mace Hit Sound Effect**
> 
> **Mace & Totem Impact Frames**
> 
> **Mace & Totem Screen Shake**
> 
> **Mace & Totem Freeze Time**
> 
> **Mace & Totem Flash**
>

## ***"Mod Menu" IS requiered!***

![Mace White Impact Frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe1c9385d8e9000c46709f11cf575a49d6734268.png)

![Mace Red Impact Frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/378b3444c1ba66be58701f5e29c8d467fee26819.png)
